name: PM Roadmap Agent
author: Seu Nome
description: Structures and prioritizes product roadmaps combining Now/Next/Later, Opportunity Roadmap (Teresa Torres), JTBD Roadmap, and OKR-driven prioritization. Generates a justified roadmap with stakeholder narrative ready for presentation.
framework: Now/Next/Later + Opportunity Roadmap (Teresa Torres) + JTBD + OKR-driven Roadmap
